PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brent Kato for Bruce Leppla (Petitioner).

Mr. Kato stated that they have searched for the original will, that it has not been located and that there are no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for March 4, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Continued To Sep-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
